description: Level/area definitions -- monster levels, density, waypoints, and act assignments. Loaded by two functions: LoadLevelsTxtData (record size 0x220) and LoadLevelDefsTxt (leveldefs record size 0x9C).

Id.description: Unique level ID number, stored as byte at record offset 0x00 in levels.txt record

Pal.description: Palette index for this level, stored as byte at record offset 0x04

Act.description: Act number this level belongs to, stored as byte at record offset in levels.txt

QuestFlag.description: Quest progression flag used by the DRLG to gate level generation. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x00

QuestFlagEx.description: Extended quest flag for additional quest-gated level generation logic. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x04

Layer.description: Level layer used for automap and rendering overlays. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x08

SizeX.description: Normal difficulty width in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x0C

SizeY.description: Normal difficulty height in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x18

SizeX(N).description: Nightmare difficulty width in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x10

SizeY(N).description: Nightmare difficulty height in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x1C

SizeX(H).description: Hell difficulty width in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x14

SizeY(H).description: Hell difficulty height in grid cells. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x20

OffsetX.description: Horizontal placement offset. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x24

OffsetY.description: Vertical placement offset. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x28

Depend.description: Level dependency for non-random, non-preset levels. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x2C

Teleport.description: Teleport permission flag (0=not allowed, 1=allowed, 2=allowed within level only). Stored as byte in levels.txt record

Rain.description: Whether rain/snow weather effects occur in this level. Stored as byte in levels.txt record

Mud.description: Whether mud/slow movement effect is active in this level. Stored as byte in levels.txt record

NoPer.description: Whether perspective mode is disabled for this level. Stored as byte in levels.txt record

IsInside.description: Whether this level is indoors (affects lighting and weather). Stored as byte in levels.txt record

DrawEdges.description: Whether to draw black map edge borders around the level. Stored as byte in levels.txt record

WarpDist.description: Minimum tile distance from edge for warp placement. Stored as dword at levels.txt record offset 0x0C

MonLvl1.description: Normal difficulty monster level. Stored as word at record offset 0x10

MonLvl2.description: Nightmare difficulty monster level. Stored as word at record offset 0x12

MonLvl3.description: Hell difficulty monster level. Stored as word at record offset 0x14

MonLvl1Ex.description: Normal difficulty expansion monster level override (used for Expansion-only areas). Stored as word at record offset 0x16

MonLvl2Ex.description: Nightmare difficulty expansion monster level override. Stored as word at record offset 0x18

MonLvl3Ex.description: Hell difficulty expansion monster level override. Stored as word at record offset 0x1A

MonDen.description: Normal difficulty monster density multiplier. Stored as dword at record offset 0x1C

MonDen(N).description: Nightmare difficulty monster density multiplier. Stored as dword at record offset 0x20

MonDen(H).description: Hell difficulty monster density multiplier. Stored as dword at record offset 0x24

MonUMin.description: Minimum unique/champion monster packs in Normal. Stored as byte at record offset 0x28

MonUMin(N).description: Minimum unique/champion monster packs in Nightmare. Stored as byte at record offset 0x29

MonUMin(H).description: Minimum unique/champion monster packs in Hell. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2A

MonUMax.description: Maximum unique/champion monster packs in Normal. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2B

MonUMax(N).description: Maximum unique/champion monster packs in Nightmare. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2C

MonUMax(H).description: Maximum unique/champion monster packs in Hell. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2D

MonWndr.description: Whether monsters wander randomly in this level instead of staying near spawn. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2E

MonSpcWalk.description: Whether monsters use special walk/pathfinding behavior. Stored as byte at record offset 0x2F

Quest.description: Associated quest ID that this level participates in. Stored as byte at record offset 0x30

rangedspawn.description: Whether ranged monsters are allowed to spawn in this level. Stored as byte at record offset 0x31

NumMon.description: Number of different monster types to pick from the mon1-25 pool. Stored as byte at record offset 0x32

mon1.description: Normal monster type 1 from monstats.txt Id. Resolved to monstats index and stored as word at record offset 0x36. Engine counts valid entries into byte at 0x33

mon2.description: Normal monster type 2 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x38

mon3.description: Normal monster type 3 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x3A

mon4.description: Normal monster type 4 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x3C

mon5.description: Normal monster type 5 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x3E

mon6.description: Normal monster type 6 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x40

mon7.description: Normal monster type 7 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x42

mon8.description: Normal monster type 8 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x44

mon9.description: Normal monster type 9 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x46

mon10.description: Normal monster type 10 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x48

mon11.description: Normal monster type 11 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x4A

mon12.description: Normal monster type 12 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x4C

mon13.description: Normal monster type 13 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x4E

mon14.description: Normal monster type 14 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x50

mon18.description: Normal monster type 18 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x58

mon19.description: Normal monster type 19 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x5A

mon20.description: Normal monster type 20 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x5C

mon21.description: Normal monster type 21 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x5E

mon22.description: Normal monster type 22 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x60

mon23.description: Normal monster type 23 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x62

mon24.description: Normal monster type 24 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x64

mon25.description: Normal monster type 25 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x66

nmon1.description: Nightmare-only monster type 1 from monstats.txt Id. Resolved and stored as word at record offset 0x68. Engine counts valid entries into byte at 0x34

nmon2.description: Nightmare-only monster type 2 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x6A

nmon3.description: Nightmare-only monster type 3 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x6C

nmon4.description: Nightmare-only monster type 4 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x6E

nmon5.description: Nightmare-only monster type 5 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x70

nmon6.description: Nightmare-only monster type 6 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x72

nmon8.description: Nightmare-only monster type 8 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x76

nmon9.description: Nightmare-only monster type 9 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x78

nmon10.description: Nightmare-only monster type 10 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x7A

nmon11.description: Nightmare-only monster type 11 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x7C

nmon12.description: Nightmare-only monster type 12 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x7E

nmon13.description: Nightmare-only monster type 13 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x80

nmon14.description: Nightmare-only monster type 14 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x82

nmon15.description: Nightmare-only monster type 15 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x84

nmon16.description: Nightmare-only monster type 16 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x86

nmon17.description: Nightmare-only monster type 17 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x88

nmon18.description: Nightmare-only monster type 18 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x8A

nmon19.description: Nightmare-only monster type 19 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x8C

nmon20.description: Nightmare-only monster type 20 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x8E

nmon21.description: Nightmare-only monster type 21 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x90

nmon22.description: Nightmare-only monster type 22 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x92

nmon23.description: Nightmare-only monster type 23 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x94

nmon24.description: Nightmare-only monster type 24 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x96

nmon25.description: Nightmare-only monster type 25 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x98

umon1.description: Unique/champion monster type 1 from monstats.txt Id. Resolved and stored as word at record offset 0x9A. Engine counts valid entries into byte at 0x35

umon2.description: Unique/champion monster type 2 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x9C

umon3.description: Unique/champion monster type 3 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0x9E

umon4.description: Unique/champion monster type 4 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xA0

umon5.description: Unique/champion monster type 5 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xA2

umon6.description: Unique/champion monster type 6 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xA4

umon7.description: Unique/champion monster type 7 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xA6

umon8.description: Unique/champion monster type 8 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xA8

umon9.description: Unique/champion monster type 9 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xAA

umon10.description: Unique/champion monster type 10 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xAC

umon11.description: Unique/champion monster type 11 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xAE

umon12.description: Unique/champion monster type 12 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xB0

umon13.description: Unique/champion monster type 13 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xB2

umon14.description: Unique/champion monster type 14 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xB4

umon15.description: Unique/champion monster type 15 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xB6

umon16.description: Unique/champion monster type 16 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xB8

umon17.description: Unique/champion monster type 17 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xBA

umon18.description: Unique/champion monster type 18 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xBC

umon19.description: Unique/champion monster type 19 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xBE

umon20.description: Unique/champion monster type 20 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xC0

umon21.description: Unique/champion monster type 21 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xC2

umon22.description: Unique/champion monster type 22 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xC4

umon23.description: Unique/champion monster type 23 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xC6

umon24.description: Unique/champion monster type 24 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xC8

umon25.description: Unique/champion monster type 25 from monstats.txt Id. Stored as word at record offset 0xCA

cmon1.description: Champion monster type 1 that can spawn as champion pack. Resolved from monstats.txt Id, stored as word at record offset 0xCC

cmon2.description: Champion monster type 2 that can spawn as champion pack. Stored as word at record offset 0xCE

cmon3.description: Champion monster type 3 that can spawn as champion pack. Stored as word at record offset 0xD0

cmon4.description: Champion monster type 4 that can spawn as champion pack. Stored as word at record offset 0xD2

cpct1.description: Spawn chance percentage for champion monster type 1 (cmon1). Stored as word at record offset 0xD4

cpct2.description: Spawn chance percentage for champion monster type 2 (cmon2). Stored as word at record offset 0xD6

cpct3.description: Spawn chance percentage for champion monster type 3 (cmon3). Stored as word at record offset 0xD8

cpct4.description: Spawn chance percentage for champion monster type 4 (cmon4). Stored as word at record offset 0xDA

camt1.description: Spawn count for champion monster type 1 (cmon1). Stored as word at record offset 0xDC

camt2.description: Spawn count for champion monster type 2 (cmon2). Stored as word at record offset 0xDE

camt3.description: Spawn count for champion monster type 3 (cmon3). Stored as word at record offset 0xE0

camt4.description: Spawn count for champion monster type 4 (cmon4). Stored as word at record offset 0xE2

Waypoint.description: Waypoint index assigned to this level (0xFF=none). Stored as byte at record offset 0xE4

ObjGrp0.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 0. Stored as byte at record offset 0xE5

ObjGrp1.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 1. Stored as byte at record offset 0xE6

ObjGrp2.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 2. Stored as byte at record offset 0xE7

ObjGrp3.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 3. Stored as byte at record offset 0xE8

ObjGrp4.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 4. Stored as byte at record offset 0xE9

ObjGrp5.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 5. Stored as byte at record offset 0xEA

ObjGrp6.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 6. Stored as byte at record offset 0xEB

ObjGrp7.description: Object group ID from objgroup.txt for slot 7. Stored as byte at record offset 0xEC

ObjPrb0.description: Spawn probability for object group 0 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xED

ObjPrb1.description: Spawn probability for object group 1 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xEE

ObjPrb2.description: Spawn probability for object group 2 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xEF

ObjPrb3.description: Spawn probability for object group 3 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xF0

ObjPrb4.description: Spawn probability for object group 4 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xF1

ObjPrb5.description: Spawn probability for object group 5 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xF2

ObjPrb6.description: Spawn probability for object group 6 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xF3

ObjPrb7.description: Spawn probability for object group 7 (0-100). Stored as byte at record offset 0xF4

LevelName.description: Display name string key used for UI. Stored as char[40] at record offset 0xF5

LevelWarp.description: Warp visual name string referenced for level transitions. Stored as char[40] at record offset 0x11D

EntryFile.description: DC6 title image file loaded when entering the level. Stored as char[40] at record offset 0x145

Themes.description: Number of visual themes available for random decoration. Stored as dword at record offset 0x210

FloorFilter.description: Floor tile filter type controlling which floor warps are valid. Stored as dword at record offset 0x214

BlankScreen.description: Whether to show a blank/loading screen on level transition. Stored as dword at record offset 0x218

SoundEnv.description: Sound environment ID from soundenviron.txt. Stored as byte at record offset 0x21C

DrlgType.description: Level generation type (1=random maze, 2=preset map, 3=random with outdoor tiles). Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x30

LevelType.description: Visual level type ID controlling tileset and style. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x34

SubType.description: Sub-level type from LVLSub.txt for room substitutions (-1=none). Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x38

SubTheme.description: Sub-theme type index for visual variation within the level type. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x3C

SubWaypoint.description: Sub-level waypoint setting from LVLSub.txt (-1=none). Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x40

SubShrine.description: Sub-level shrine setting from LVLSub.txt (-1=none). Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x44

Vis0.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 0 (level connected via warp). Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x48

Vis1.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 1. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x4C

Vis2.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 2. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x50

Vis3.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 3. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x54

Vis4.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 4. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x58

Vis5.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 5. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x5C

Vis6.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 6. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x60

Vis7.description: Visible adjacent level ID for slot 7. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x64

Warp0.description: Warp visual ID for slot 0 connecting to Vis0. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x68

Warp1.description: Warp visual ID for slot 1 connecting to Vis1. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x6C

Warp2.description: Warp visual ID for slot 2 connecting to Vis2. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x70

Warp3.description: Warp visual ID for slot 3 connecting to Vis3. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x74

Warp4.description: Warp visual ID for slot 4 connecting to Vis4. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x78

Warp5.description: Warp visual ID for slot 5 connecting to Vis5. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x7C

Warp6.description: Warp visual ID for slot 6 connecting to Vis6. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x80

Warp7.description: Warp visual ID for slot 7 connecting to Vis7. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x84

Intensity.description: Light intensity for this level. Stored as byte at leveldefs offset 0x88

Red.description: Red color component for level ambient lighting. Stored as byte at leveldefs offset 0x89

Green.description: Green color component for level ambient lighting. Stored as byte at leveldefs offset 0x8A

Blue.description: Blue color component for level ambient lighting. Stored as byte at leveldefs offset 0x8B

Portal.description: Whether town portal can be cast in this level. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x8C

Position.description: Position ordering within act for level sequencing. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x90

SaveMonsters.description: Whether monster state is preserved when leaving and re-entering. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x94

LOSDraw.description: Whether to draw line-of-sight blocking walls. Stored as dword at leveldefs offset 0x98
